LAW AND MOTION 301, MOTION TO QUASH SERVICE OF SUMMONS OR STAY OR DISMISS. MOVING AND OPPOSING PARTIES APPEARED. ARGUED AND THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING -- DEFENDANT BERNHARD G. BENSE & ROBERT WEST'S MOTION TO QUASH SERVICE OF SUMMONS OR STAY OR DISMISS: MOTION TO QUASH - GRANTED. THE INCORRECT BOX CHECKED ON SUMMONS INVALIDATE SERVICE ON PARTNERSHIP. HON. Off Calendar May-24-2002 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
James Paul Green, Esq. 621-1501 for BERNHARD G. BENSE and ROBERT WEST, a Partnership moving to quash service of process and for dismissal
Plaintiff Jay Tobin in propria persona (650/738-9675) and opposing party

Argued and the Court adopted its tentative ruling -- Defendant BERNHARD G. BENSE & ROBERT WEST's Motion to Quash Service of Summons or Stay or Dismiss: Motion to quash - Granted. The Incorrect box checked on summons invalidate service on partnership. (AJR/MD) Patricia M. Evezich, CSR 1193
